The '''Class-K cargo container''' was a small box-shaped freight container manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] and designed to be carried by [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] such as the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]]. The container was used to store cargo during transit in both [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. While the container was very commonly used throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], it was not capable of transporting flammable or explosive goods.<ref name="XWA" />

*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
